parameters.query: ={{"WITH req AS (SELECT '" + String($json.campaign_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::text AS campaign_id, '" + String($json.workspace_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::text AS workspace_id, '" + String($json.task_type || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::text AS task_type, '" + String($json.prompt || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::text AS prompt, '" + JSON.stringify($json.constraints || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb AS constraints, " + ($json.valid_request ? "TRUE" : "FALSE") + " AS valid_request, '" + String($json.received_at || new Date().toISOString()).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::timestamptz AS received_at) SELECT req.campaign_id, req.workspace_id, req.task_type, req.prompt, req.constraints, req.valid_request, req.received_at, COALESCE(c.strategy_json, '{}'::jsonb) AS campaign_strategy, COALESCE(cs.constraints_json, '{}'::jsonb) AS constraints_json, COALESCE(cs.strategy_json, '{}'::jsonb) AS strategy_json, COALESCE(bm.winning_tones_json, '{}'::jsonb) AS winning_tones_json, COALESCE(bm.winning_channels_json, '{}'::jsonb) AS winning_channels_json FROM req LEFT JOIN campaigns c ON c.id = req.campaign_id AND c.workspace_id = req.workspace_id LEFT JOIN campaign_strategies cs ON cs.campaign_id = c.id LEFT JOIN brand_memory bm ON bm.workspace_id = req.workspace_id LIMIT 1;"}}

={{"INSERT INTO generated_media (campaign_id, workspace_id, media_type, task_type, channel, media_url, job_id, status, prompt_used, provider_payload_json, error_message, publish_scheduled_at, updated_at) VALUES ('" + String($json.campaign_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + String($json.workspace_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + String($json.media_type || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + String($json.task_type || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', " + (($json.channel === null || $json.channel === undefined || $json.channel === '') ? "NULL" : ("'" + String($json.channel).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")) + ", " + (($json.media_url === null || $json.media_url === undefined || $json.media_url === '') ? "NULL" : ("'" + String($json.media_url).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")) + ", " + (($json.job_id === null || $json.job_id === undefined || $json.job_id === '') ? "NULL" : ("'" + String($json.job_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")) + ", '" + String($json.status || 'queued').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + String($json.prompt || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + JSON.stringify($json.provider_payload_json || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb, " + (($json.error_message === null || $json.error_message === undefined || $json.error_message === '') ? "NULL" : ("'" + String($json.error_message).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")) + ", NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (campaign_id, task_type) DO UPDATE SET media_type = EXCLUDED.media_type, workspace_id = EXCLUDED.workspace_id, channel = EXCLUDED.channel, media_url = EXCLUDED.media_url, job_id = EXCLUDED.job_id, status = EXCLUDED.status, prompt_used = EXCLUDED.prompt_used, provider_payload_json = EXCLUDED.provider_payload_json, error_message = EXCLUDED.error_message, publish_scheduled_at = EXCLUDED.publish_scheduled_at, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id, campaign_id, workspace_id, task_type, status, media_url, job_id, provider_payload_json;"}}

={{"INSERT INTO visual_insights (campaign_id, workspace_id, insight_type, insight_json, updated_at) VALUES ('" + String($json.campaign_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + String($json.workspace_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + String($json.task_type || 'generation').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + JSON.stringify({ status: $json.status || null, media_url: $json.media_url || null, job_id: $json.job_id || null }).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb, NOW()) RETURNING id, campaign_id, workspace_id;"}}

parameters.responseBody: ={{(() => { const row = $node['W4 Upsert Generated Media'].json || {}; return { campaign_id: row.campaign_id, workspace_id: row.workspace_id, task_type: row.task_type, status: row.status, media_url: row.media_url, job_id: row.job_id }; })()}}
